mapper.sql: id, source_id, file_name, status, progress, step, total_chunks, completed_chunks, pages_created, pages_updated, error_message, quality_report, operator_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM wiki_ingest_tasks ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM wiki_ingest_tasks WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_ingest_tasks (source_id, file_name, status, progress, step, total_chunks, quality_report, operator_id) VALUES (#{sourceId}, #{fileName}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{step}, #{totalChunks}, #{qualityReport}, #{operatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE wiki_ingest_tasks SET progress=#{progress}, step=#{step}, completed_chunks=#{completedChunks}, status='PROCESSING' WHERE id=#{id} AND status != 'PAUSED'
UPDATE wiki_ingest_tasks SET progress=#{progress}, step=#{step}, completed_chunks=#{completedChunks}, total_chunks=#{totalChunks}, status='PROCESSING' WHERE id=#{id} AND status != 'PAUSED'
UPDATE wiki_ingest_tasks SET pages_created=#{pagesCreated}, pages_updated=#{pagesUpdated}, status='COMPLETED', progress=100, step='编译完成', completed_chunks=total_chunks WHERE id=#{id}
